purpose: Stratified test battery for V022.30. Each athlete has provenance (where the ranking came from) and expected verdict band (what FieldCheck SHOULD produce given the data).

verdict_band_meanings.GOOD: composite 7.0-8.4 · top tier of cohort, multi-source
verdict_band_meanings.AVERAGE: composite 5.0-6.9 · solid but not elite, partial source coverage
verdict_band_meanings.BELOW: composite 3.5-4.9 · below-average for cohort, limited data
verdict_band_meanings.SPARSE: composite null or 3-5 with HIGH uncertainty flags · little or no data, model should SAY SO
